name: Broccoli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Broccoli, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the broccoli, bacon, cheese, and onion in a large bowl.
2. In a separate small bowl, mix together the salad dressing, sugar, and vinegar.
3. Pour the dressing mixture over the broccoli mixture and toss until well combined.
